lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eihu jeeo sadaa mukat hai sahaje rahiaa samaae |2|
lines.english: Then, this soul is liberated forever, and it remains absorbed in celestial bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਕੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh sansaar upaae kai vas aapanai keetaa |
lines.english: God created the Universe, and He keeps it under His power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਬੁਝਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai jeevat marai bujh sach sameetaa |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, one remains dead while yet alive; understanding Him, he is absorbed in the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: ganatai prabhoo na paaeeai doojai bharameetaa |
lines.english: God cannot be obtained by counting; the mortal wanders in doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਵਿਗਸੀਤਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh jaanai kare aap aape vigaseetaa |4|
lines.english: He knows everything, and Himself does everything; beholding His Creation, He rejoices. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਖੋਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabade haumai khoeeai har mel mileetaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, egotism is eradicated, and one is united in the Lord's Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਲਾਇਓ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵਸਿਓ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur siau chit na laaeo naam na vasio man aae |
lines.english: One who has not focused his consciousness on the True Guru, and into whose mind the Naam does not come

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਇਵੇਹਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਕਿਆ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig ivehaa jeeviaa kiaa jug meh paaeaa aae |
lines.english: cursed is such a life. What has he gained by coming into the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਖੋਟੀ ਰਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਏਕ ਚਸੇ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਜੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa khottee raas hai ek chase meh paaj leh jaae |
lines.english: Maya is false capital; in an instant, its false covering falls off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਥਹੁ ਛੁੜਕੀ ਤਨੁ ਸਿਆਹੁ ਹੋਇ ਬਦਨੁ ਜਾਇ ਕੁਮਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hathahu chhurrakee tan siaahu hoe badan jaae kumalaae |
lines.english: When it slips from his hand, his body turns black, and his face withers away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin satigur siau chit laaeaa tina sukh vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on the True Guru - peace comes to abide in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaaveh rang siau har naam rahe liv laae |
lines.english: They meditate on the Name of the Lord with love; they are lovingly attuned to the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਸਉਪਿਆ ਜਿ ਜੀਅ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur so dhan saupiaa ji jeea meh rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Guru has bestowed upon them the wealth, which remains contained within their hearts.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਉ ਅਗਲਾ ਵੰਨੀ ਚੜੈ ਚੜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rang tisai kau agalaa vanee charrai charraae |1|
lines.english: They are imbued with supreme love; its color increases day by day. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੋਈ ਗਾਰੜੂ ਤਿਨਿ ਮਲਿ ਦਲਿ ਲਾਈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh koee gaararroo tin mal dal laaee paae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is a snake-charmer; he has trampled her and thrown her down, and crushed her underfoot.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਕਉ ਫਿਰਿ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis kee sevaa jo kare tis hee kau fir khaae |
lines.english: Whoever serves her, she ultimately devours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਹੋਈ ਨਾਗਨੀ ਜਗਤਿ ਰਹੀ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa hoee naaganee jagat rahee lapattaae |
lines.english: Maya is a serpent, clinging to the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਈ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak seee ubare ji sach rahe liv laae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone are saved, who remain lovingly absorbed in the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਧੀਰਕ ਹੋਇ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: andar dheerak hoe pooraa paaeisee |
lines.english: He is comforted within his mind, and he obtains the Perfect Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲੇਖੁ ਸੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa lekh se karam kamaaeisee |
lines.english: Whatever destiny is pre-ordained by the Lord, those are the deeds he does.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਕਰੇ ਪੁਕਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਸੁਣਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee kare pukaar prabhoo sunaaeisee |
lines.english: The minstrel cries out, and God hears him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਅਤਿ ਵਡਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲਾਇਸੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: so prabh meraa at vaddaa guramukh melaaeisee |5|
lines.english: That God of mine is so very great; as Gurmukh, I have met Him. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਖਸਮੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa hovai khasam deaal taa mehal ghar paaeisee |
lines.english: When the Lord and Master becomes Merciful, then one obtains the Mansion of the Lord's Presence as his home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਸਹੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਰਹੈ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa sahu ek hai sad hee rahai hajoor |
lines.english: There is One Lord God of all; He remains ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਮੰਨਈ ਤਾ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam na manee taa ghar hee andar door |
lines.english: O Nanak, if one does not obey the Hukam of the Lord's Command, then within one's own home, the Lord seems far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hukam man sukh paaeaa prem suhaagan hoe |1|
lines.english: Obeying His Command, one obtains peace, and becomes the happy, loving soul-bride. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਭੀ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਮਨਾਇਸੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukam bhee tinaa manaaeisee jina kau nadar karee |
lines.english: They alone obey the Lord's Command, upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਜਲਿ ਮੁਈ ਕੰਤ ਨ ਲਾਇਓ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rain sabaaee jal muee kant na laaeo bhaau |
lines.english: She who does not love her Husband Lord, burns and wastes away all through the night of her life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸਨਿ ਸੋੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sukh vasan souhaaganee jina piaaraa purakh har raau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the soul-brides dwell in peace; they have the Lord, their King, as their Husband. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੈ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag fir mai dekhiaa har iko daataa |
lines.english: Roaming over the entire world, I have seen that the Lord is the only Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee har man vasai har sahaje jaataa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord comes to dwell in the mind, and the Lord is easily revealed within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਾਇ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aupaae kitai na paaeeai har karam bidhaataa |
lines.english: The Lord cannot be obtained by any device at all; He is the Architect of Karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੇ ਕੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲਾਤਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: vaddee vaddiaaee vadde kee guramukh bolaataa |6|
lines.english: The great greatness of the great Lord God - the Gurmukh speaks of this. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: andarahu trisanaa agan bujhee har amrit sar naataa |
lines.english: The fire of desire within is quenched, and one bathes in the Lord's Pool of Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਹੰਸ ਕਿਆ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਪਇਆ ਹੀ ਛਡਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa hans kiaa preet hai ji peaa hee chhadd jaae |
lines.english: What love is this between the body and soul, which ends when the body falls?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਸ ਨੋ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਕਿ ਖਵਾਲੀਐ ਜਿ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: es no koorr bol ki khavaaleeai ji chaladiaa naal na jaae |
lines.english: Why feed it by telling lies? When you leave, it does not go with you.
